-- This is auto-generated code
SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://dftestsa1910.dfs.core.windows.net/my-container/fabric/csv_sales/sales_jan2024.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
    ) AS [result]


SELECT
    TOP 100 *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'abfss://my-container@dftestsa1910.dfs.core.windows.net/fabric/csv_sales/sales_jan2024.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
        ROWTERMINATOR = '\n',
        FIELDTERMINATOR = ','
       
    ) AS [result]
